items.label: Getting Started
items.content:
ZYNQPeer simplifies peer-to-peer data, video, and audio communication.

This guide explains how to create connections and exchange data between peers.

Usage
Data Connections
Video & Audio Calls
Getting Started
items.content: ZYNQGames is a game library system with search, filters, favorites, and device-aware compatibility.

items.label: Setup
Usage
Filtering
History
items.content:
## Add to history

```js
games.addToHistory('game-alias');
```

## Get history

```js
console.log(games.getHistory());
```

## Clear history

```js
games.clearHistory();
```
